case_title: JAE O. YANG VS. STEVE D. BUTLER (DRIVER) et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S DAUGHTER CHRISTINA YANG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/KOREAN - KOREAN/ENGLISH ON HEE BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, JAE O. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUTLER  (DRIVER), STEVE D. BUTLER  (OWNER), SHERRY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
